name: athena-core-v2-real
description: Real-task benchmark suite for delivery quality gates (non-smoke).

tasks.goal: Audit and, if needed, fix timeout outcome reason taxonomy across src/main.rs, src/core.rs, and scripts/eval_harness.py. Canonical reason codes must be: dispatch_timeout, outcome_wait_timeout, stale_started. Run relevant tests and summarize what changed.

Audit and, if needed, fix coding CLI contract and deterministic fallback policy in src/tools.rs and src/strategy/code.rs. Failure outputs should include [athena_cli_contract] with code/retry_same/fallback fields. Run tests and summarize outcomes.
tasks.test_command: cargo test -q cli_failure_policy && cargo test -q test_cli_error_policy_classification

tasks.goal: Analyze latest delivery failures from eval/results/improvement-backlog-latest.md and eval/results/dashboard.md. Return exactly 3 bullets: each bullet must include one root cause and one concrete patch plan. Do not edit files.
